/* To prevent any potential data loss issues, you should review this script in detail before running it outside the context of the database designer.*/
BEGIN TRANSACTION
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
SET ARITHABORT ON
SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF
SET CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL ON
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
SET ANSI_PADDING ON
SET ANSI_WARNINGS ON
COMMIT
BEGIN TRANSACTION
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__BSD_AccessProfile ADD
	EditLagerStock bit NULL,
	EditLagerCCID bit NULL,
	EditLagerOrderProposal bit NULL
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__BSD_AccessProfile SET (LOCK_ESCALATION = TABLE)
GO
COMMIT
select Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__BSD_AccessProfile', 'Object', 'ALTER') as ALT_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__BSD_AccessProfile', 'Object', 'VIEW DEFINITION') as View_def_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__BSD_AccessProfile', 'Object', 'CONTROL') as Contr_Per 




-- Add Articles BOM / CP Control
/* To prevent any potential data loss issues, you should review this script in detail before running it outside the context of the database designer.*/
BEGIN TRANSACTION
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
SET ARITHABORT ON
SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF
SET CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL ON
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
SET ANSI_PADDING ON
SET ANSI_WARNINGS ON
COMMIT
BEGIN TRANSACTION
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__BSD_AccessProfile ADD
	ArticlesBOMCPControlHistory bit NULL,
	ArticlesBOMCPControlEngineering bit NULL,
	ArticlesBOMCPControlQuality bit NULL
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__BSD_AccessProfile SET (LOCK_ESCALATION = TABLE)
GO
COMMIT
select Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__BSD_AccessProfile', 'Object', 'ALTER') as ALT_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__BSD_AccessProfile', 'Object', 'VIEW DEFINITION') as View_def_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__BSD_AccessProfile', 'Object', 'CONTROL') as Contr_Per
